findings.description: Homepage lacks clear visual entry point — competing headlines and CTAs create equal visual weight
findings.fix: Establish a single primary focal point using size contrast and whitespace

findings.description: Body text line length exceeds 80 characters on wide screens
findings.fix: Add max-width constraint (65ch) to paragraph containers

findings.description: Placeholder text in form inputs fails WCAG AA contrast (2.8:1 ratio)
findings.fix: Darken placeholder color from #b0b0b0 to #767676 for 4.5:1 ratio

findings.description: Secondary button text on light gray background has only 3.2:1 contrast
findings.fix: Darken button text or increase background contrast to meet 4.5:1

findings.description: Inconsistent spacing between card components — varies between 16px, 20px, and 24px
findings.fix: Standardize card gap to 24px using spacing token --space-lg

findings.description: Missing loading state for data table — no skeleton screen or spinner during fetch
findings.fix: Add skeleton loader matching table row structure

findings.description: Empty state for search results shows only 'No results' without guidance
findings.fix: Add suggestions: check spelling, try different keywords, or browse categories

findings.description: Focus indicators removed globally with outline:none and no replacement
findings.fix: Add visible focus-visible styles using 2px ring with brand color

findings.description: Breadcrumb navigation missing on product detail pages
findings.fix: Add breadcrumb component showing Category > Subcategory > Product

findings.description: Data table requires horizontal scroll on mobile with no indication
findings.fix: Add scroll shadow indicators or convert to card layout on mobile

findings.description: Form inputs missing associated label elements — using placeholder only
findings.fix: Add visible <label> elements with for attribute matching input id

findings.description: Modal dialog does not trap focus — tab key moves to background content
findings.fix: Implement focus trap within modal and return focus on close
Add skip-to-content link as first focusable element

findings.description: Page transition animations do not respect prefers-reduced-motion
findings.fix: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) to disable or minimize animations

findings.description: Error messages are generic — 'Something went wrong' without specific guidance
findings.fix: Replace with specific messages: what failed, why, and what the user can do

findings.description: Three CTA buttons all say 'Learn More' without differentiating destination
findings.fix: Use specific labels: 'View pricing', 'Read documentation', 'See case studies'

findings.description: Hero section follows generic centered-text-over-gradient pattern
findings.fix: Redesign with asymmetric layout using product screenshots or interactive demo

findings.description: Features section uses exact 3-column icon+heading+paragraph grid
findings.fix: Vary layout with different block sizes or add product screenshots

findings.description: Hero image causes layout shift (CLS) while loading
findings.fix: Add explicit width/height attributes or aspect-ratio CSS to image container

coherence.notes: Generally consistent visual language with some off-system elements. Typography and color are cohesive but spacing inconsistencies break the rhythm.
